coastal plants **Sea almond and similar trees on the shores
How to tell them apart?
updated Aug 09**

These plants look very similar at first glance. Here’s more on how to tell them apart.

Sea almond
(Terminalia catappa)

Large leaves

Flowers tiny,
arranged on long stalks

Fruits almond-shaped, small.

Ketapang pasir
(Guettarda speciosa)

Large leaves.

Flowers trumpet-shaped, small.

Fruits round, small.

Putat laut or Sea poison
(Barringtonia asiatica)

Large leaves.

Flowers large, fluffy.

Fruits squarish, large.
